HyAxiom announces first multi-megawatt, multi-story fuel cell project in Bridgeport, delivering low-emission power.
news.summary: An initiative in Bridgeport, the Charter Oak Combined Heat and Power (CHP) Project, is striving to offer environmentally friendly power generation with minimal emissions, alongside high efficiency in combined heat and power production. This project is set to produce local energy benefits as well. On April 2, 2025, HyAxiom, Inc., a prominent company in fuel cell and hydrogen solutions worldwide, unveiled this significant initiative. The project's main focus is on delivering low-emission power, attaining high efficiency in CHP, and bringing energy advantages to the local community.

news.headline: Trump reiterates that tax cuts will be passed.
Swiss President Keller-Sutter: The Swiss Federal Council takes note of the US tariff decisions. It will quickly determine the next steps.
Trump: Social security won't be cut.
Legal team investigating potential lawsuit for Libra investors over Milei-backed Solana token launch in Feb. Allegations include fraud and racketeering.
news.summary: The Treanor Law Firm is currently looking into claims of fraud, market manipulation, and racketeering linked to the debut of Libra in February.

news.headline: US to impose 10% tariff on Qatar - Chart.
Trump tariff list contined (again)
American Century Investments discusses investor opportunities in uncertain market conditions dominated by policy issues in its second quarter outlook.
news.summary: American Century Investments has released its second quarter investment outlook, highlighting opportunities in a tumultuous season marked by uncertainties in policy and markets. The report, issued on April 2, 2025 in Kansas City, Missouri, covers a range of pressing issues such as tariffs, spending cuts, and interest rates. The insights provided shed light on current challenges and potential investment avenues amid the evolving economic landscape. This update is part of the company's continuous efforts to guide investors through the complexities of the market.

news.headline: Frontline healthcare providers celebrate proposed healthcare transparency laws at Independent Medical Alliance Annual Conference in Washington. (Characters: 131)
news.summary: The upcoming Independent Medical Alliance (IMA) annual conference in Washington on April 2, 2025, will showcase a series of recent achievements at the federal and state levels. The conference will bring together leading doctors, healthcare providers, and researchers to discuss important victories in the medical field. This event is expected to draw a significant number of participants eager to learn from the success stories and advancements in healthcare policy.

news.headline: Kenon Holdings announces 2024 results, $250 million cash dividend approved in April 2025.
news.summary: Singapore, April 2, 2025 - Kenon Holdings Ltd. disclosed their financial outcomes for 2024 alongside latest developments. Noteworthy figures include a cash dividend sanctioned by the board of directors amounting to around $250 million, equivalent to $4.80 for each share. Kenon, listed on NYSE as KEN and TASE as KEN, presented its Q4 highlights and recent achievements.

news.headline: Market futures plunge as Trump reveals tariffs higher than anticipated. Stay updated.
Trump Tariff list continued
Cryptocurrency market surges ahead of Trump tariff announcement. Bitcoin at $86,692.07 (+2%), Ethereum lags at $1,912.93.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are on the rise in anticipation of a significant tariff announcement from President Trump. Prices for various cryptocurrencies have seen positive gains, with Bitcoin at $86,692.07 (+2%), Ethereum at $1,912.93 (+0.2%), Solana at $131.12 (+3.4%), XRP at $2.15 (+0.8%), Dogecoin at $0.1740 (+1.2%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001268 (-0.04%). Notable statistics indicate a decrease of 18.6% in large transaction volumes, a 4.7% growth in daily active addresses, and a rise in transactions over $100,000 from 10,147 to 10,387 in a day. Additionally, exchanges netflows are down by 66.4%. In the past 24 hours, Coinglass data shows 107,025 traders were liquidated, leading to a total loss of $236.01 million. Crypto chart analyst Ali Martinez's insights can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Hyperscale Data, Inc. (AMEX: GPUS) stock rose as its subsidiary, Sentium, mined 56 Bitcoins in 2025, totaling 3,061 since 2021.
news.summary: Shares of Hyperscale Data, Inc. (GPUS) saw an increase in trading on Wednesday following the news that its subsidiary, Sentium, has successfully mined an additional 56 Bitcoin between January and March 2025. This new addition brings the company's total Bitcoin holdings to 3,061 since its establishment in March 2021.

news.headline: Stablecoin legislation debate dominated by Trump's conflicts over crypto, but hasn't affected bipartisan support significantly.
news.summary: According to sources on Capitol Hill, the resistance has not significantly altered the bipartisan backing for the bill.

NCICU Annual Meeting in Cary gathered presidents from 36 private colleges on March 24-25.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina, the 2025 Annual Meeting of the North Carolina Independent Colleges and Universities (NCICU) took place on March 24–25 at The Umstead Hotel & Spa in Cary, NC. The event united presidents from 36 private, nonprofit colleges and universities in the state.

news.headline: Trump auto tariffs will cover cars, light trucks, engines, transmissions, lithium-ion batteries and lesser parts, including tires, shock absorbers, and spark plug wires.
Trump's 25% auto tariffs will extend to nearly $600 billion worth of auto parts, computer imports - Analysis of Tariff Codes Listed in Federal Register.
GeoPark submits Form 20-F for Fiscal Year 2024 to SEC. Access at www.sec.gov or website.
news.summary: Colombia-based GeoPark Limited, a prominent independent energy firm with a track record of over two decades in Latin America, has disclosed the submission of its Form 20-F for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2024, to the SEC. The company's stock is listed as NYSE: GPRK. Interested individuals can view GeoPark's Form 20-F on the SEC's site at www.sec.gov or on the "Invest with Us" segment of the company's official website at www.geo.

US to impose 26% tariff on India - Chart.
Trump: Tariffs will give us growth.
Trump: to foreign leaders: Terminate your own tariffs. Start buying American goods.
Ingram Micro's Xvantage™ platform wins 3 iF DESIGN AWARDS for user experience and innovation. Shows commitment to AI and automation in B2B tech market.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, Ingram Micro's recent awards underscore its dedication to utilizing artificial intelligence, automation, and intelligent design in providing a business-to-consumer experience within the business-to-business technology sector.

news.headline: Intel in Santa Clara to report Q1 2025 financial results on April 24.
news.summary: Intel Corporation, based in Santa Clara, California, revealed its plan to release its first-quarter financial results on Thursday, April 24, 2025.

news.headline: Trump: I call these 'kind reciprocal" tariffs.
Karman Space & Defense opens new ISO 8 Clean Room in Washington facility for spacecraft assembly, advancing lunar missions. #KRMN
news.summary: In Huntington Beach, California, Karman Space & Defense (NYSE: KRMN) unveiled a new clean room at its Washington facility. The room is specially crafted for integrating lunar landers, spacecraft, habitat modules, and satellites. Karman, a key player in designing, testing, manufacturing, and selling advanced subsystems for missiles, drones, and space systems, aims to enhance its capabilities with this addition. This strategic move demonstrates Karman's commitment to innovation and expansion in the aerospace industry.

news.headline: NuScale opens Energy Exploration Center at UNLV to develop nuclear-ready workforce.
news.summary: An Energy Exploration Center has been opened by NuScale in collaboration with the University of Nevada, Las Vegas in Corvallis, Oregon. The center aims to enhance the workforce skilled in nuclear energy.

news.headline: Linkage Global Inc consolidates shares in a 10 for 1 ratio, effective April 7, 2025, approved by board on March 21, 2025.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Japan, on April 2, 2025, Linkage Global Inc (referred to as “Linkage”), a leading cross-border e-commerce integrated services provider based in Japan, shared news that its board of directors gave the green light on March 21, 2025 for a consolidation of the Company's authorized, issued, and outstanding shares on a 10 for 1 ratio. This move is set to take effect on the marketplace as of April 7, 2025. Linkage is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol LGCB.

news.headline: Ameresco completes solar project at Killeen Regional Airport, enhancing traveler experience with covered parking and LED retrofit.
news.summary: Ameresco, Inc., a prominent energy solutions provider listed on the NYSE as AMRC, has recently finished a solar-integrated covered parking project at Killeen Regional Airport in Texas. The project's goal is to improve the traveler experience by providing covered parking in short-term parking and rental lots, in addition to implementing an LED retrofit across the airport. This initiative aims to enhance sustainability and efficiency at the airport while improving customer convenience.

news.headline: Prosper Gold Corp. closed a private placement of 5,250,000 flow-through shares at $0.10 each, raising $525,000.
news.summary: VANCOUVER, BC, April 02, 2025 – Prosper Gold Corp. disclosed the completion of a non-brokered private placement financing, issuing 5,250,000 flow-through shares at $0.10 per share, under the ticker symbol TSXV: PGX. The total gross proceeds from this Private Placement amounted to $525,000.

news.headline: Voxtur implements Advance Notice By-law for Shareholders' director nominations before meetings.
news.summary: Voxtur Analytics Corp., a technology company based in Toronto and Tampa, announced on April 2, 2025, that it has implemented an "Advance Notice By-law" to regulate the process for shareholders to nominate directors. Listed on TSXV as VXTR and OTCQB as VXTRF, Voxtur aims to enhance transparency in the real estate lending sector. This by-law establishes a deadline by which shareholders must submit director nominations before any annual or special shareholders' meeting. It outlines the necessary information Shareholders need to include in their notice to comply with the Business Corporations Act (Ontario).

news.headline: Plains All American Pipeline & Plains GP Holdings announce Q1 2025 distributions & earnings timing.
news.summary: Houston-based companies Plains All American Pipeline, L.P. (Nasdaq: PAA) and Plains GP Holdings (Nasdaq: PAGP) shared their quarterly distributions for the first quarter of 2025. Alongside this, they disclosed the schedule for the release of their earnings report for the same period. This information was revealed on April 02, 2025.

news.headline: Vital Energy (VTLE) to release Q1 2025 results on May 12, 2025. Market close. TULSA, OK.
news.summary: In Tulsa, Oklahoma, on April 2, 2025, Vital Energy, Inc. (NYSE: VTLE) announced that it will disclose its financial and operational performance for the first quarter of 2025 after the market closes on Monday, May 12, 2025.

Shareholders and interested parties can anticipate a conference call...

news.headline: AAR Corp. named Best Total Solutions Provider Repair by The145.com, a prominent aviation services provider, in 2025.
news.summary: In Wood Dale, Illinois, on April 2, 2025, AAR CORP., a key aviation services provider to commercial and government operators, MROs, and OEMs, disclosed it has been honored as a Top Shop for Best Total Solutions Provider Repair by The145.com. The recognition underscores AAR CORP.'s commitment to excellence in its services.

news.headline: Ryerson (NYSE: RYI) to discuss Q1 2025 results on May 1st. - Chicago, April 2, 2025. (Character count: 74)
news.summary: Ryerson Holding Corporation, a prominent industrial metals processor and distributor, will be conducting a conference call to discuss its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025, ending on March 31. The event will focus on reviewing the company's results during this period. Ryerson Holding Corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol RYI. The call date, time, and further details will be disclosed by the company soon.

news.headline: IGT debuts Wheel of Fortune Video Poker at Downtown Grand Hotel & Casino in Las Vegas - world's biggest video poker market.
news.summary: A novel game that combines classic IGT video poker elements with the top slot theme has been released in London, the largest video poker market globally. On April 2, 2025, International Game Technology PLC ("IGT") (NYSE: IGT) disclosed the launch of this game, marking a significant milestone in the industry.

news.headline: Fed's Kugler: I support keeping the current policy rate in place as long as upside risks to inflation continue, given stable activity and employment.
